description: Style Note Perfect for your sporting needs, this jacket from adidas is designed to keep you warm and comfortable during your training sessions in the winter chill. The Formotion technology helps you run in ease. Team it with adidas track pants and sports shoes for a sporty look. Product Details Yellow and green jacket, has mock collar, full front zipper closure, ribbed hem and cuffs, long sleeves, Adidas patented 3-Stripes from the shoulders till the cuffs, two zipped pockets on the sides and embroidered brand name and logo on the bottom left, asymmetrical panel with graphic print on the front, graphic print at the back Material and Care Polyester Gentle machine wash in cold water below 30 degrees Wash dark colours separately Do not soak, bleach or tumble dry Dry in shade Do not iron on print or decorations Size and Fit Regular fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18'') is wearing a size M
